name: RMW - G17
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - Austrian, Polymer, blocky. We all love it. Made for ALL purposes a handgun can be made for. Its everywhere in the western World. Police, Military, Everywhere. For good reason tho, reliable and accurate, easy to conceal. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
